title: create tools and armor
description: Turn your normal tools and armor into create themed ones!
body:
Change netherite and diamond tools into there Brass and Rose Quartz varients!

current items:

### Brass:

- Brass Helmet
- Brass Chestplate
- Brass Leggings
- Brass Boots

### Rose Quartz:

- Rose Quartz Helmet
- Rose Quartz Chestplate
- Rose Quartz Leggings
- Rose Quartz Boots
- Rose Quartz Sword
- Rose Quartz Axe
- Rose Quartz Pickaxe
- Rose Quartz Shovel
- Rose quartz hoe
